title_zh: 新加坡高端酒店餐饮空间家具项目
title_en: Singapore Luxury Hotel Dining Space Furniture Project
desc_zh:
该项目位于新加坡一处高端酒店餐饮空间，整体定位为精品酒店餐厅与商务宴请接待空间。空间以深色木饰面、镜面天花、暖色灯光、艺术吊灯、定制餐桌及高质感软装为主要设计语言，强调安静、私密、精致的用餐体验。

【客户核心需求】家具必须符合酒店餐饮空间的高端定位；座椅和卡座需要兼顾舒适度与耐用性；不同区域需要不同家具解决方案；家具落地效果要保持统一。

【我们的解决方案】根据酒店空间风格进行家具深化匹配，以沉稳、高级、耐用为核心。圆桌宴请区以单椅为主；靠墙卡座区采用双向对坐结构；半开放包厢区通过木质隔断、固定卡座、壁灯和餐桌形成完整用餐单元。

【落地效果】圆桌宴会区整体更加稳重正式；卡座区域通过浅色坐垫和深木结构的搭配让空间更有层次；整体实现了酒店设计感、商业耐用性、舒适体验、空间统一性之间的平衡。
desc_en: Singapore boutique hotel restaurant and business dining space. Dark wood paneling, warm lighting and artistic chandeliers create a quiet, refined dining experience. Solution: banquet chairs, booth seating, private room furniture and lounge seating.

title_zh: 纽约高端酒店软包家具项目
title_en: New York Luxury Hotel Upholstered Furniture Project
desc_zh:
该项目位于美国纽约，是一个定位高端的城市酒店项目。酒店整体空间融合了现代奢华、东方艺术感与纽约都市气质，公共区域包含大堂休闲区、酒廊、会客区、泳池休闲区及部分套房空间。

【客户需求】家具风格必须与酒店整体设计统一；产品需要适合酒店高频使用；坐感要舒适但造型不能松垮；细节工艺要经得起近距离观察。

【我们的解决方案】酒廊和会客区域以低重心沙发、休闲椅和组合座椅为主；大堂休闲区强调开放式会客体验；泳池及休闲空间注重轻盈感和舒适度；套房和私密休息区域强调安静、舒适和居住感。

【落地效果】酒廊区域沙发和休闲椅与深色吧台、暖色灯带、壁炉和木饰面形成统一氛围；公共休闲区米灰色、暖棕色软包家具让空间更有层次。
desc_en: New York high-end hotel upholstered furniture project. Modern luxury blended with Eastern artistry. Covers lobby lounge, bar, meeting areas, poolside and suite spaces with premium upholstered seating.

title_zh: 高端咖啡厅家具工程案例
title_en: Custom Furniture for a Contemporary Cafe Space
desc_zh:
本项目为一处现代商业咖啡厅空间，整体定位偏向高端、安静、松弛的城市咖啡体验。空间以大面积落地玻璃、自然采光、浅木色墙面、金属网格吊顶为主要设计语言。

【客户核心需求】家具需要符合咖啡厅整体设计调性，具备设计感，同时保持简洁克制；要适合高频商业使用；不同区域需要不同的家具组合。

【我们的解决方案】临窗区域配置木质靠背餐椅、黑色软包坐垫及圆形小餐桌；吧台区域采用黑色皮面与暖棕木色结合的休闲椅；休闲停留区搭配软包卡座、条纹布艺单椅。

【家具配置亮点】靠窗区小圆桌与轻便餐椅适合高频翻台；卡座区软包长椅提升舒适度；休闲区条纹布艺单椅形成视觉记忆点；整体颜色控制在黑色、暖棕色、浅木色之间。
desc_en: High-end modern cafe furniture project. Floor-to-ceiling glass, warm wood tones define the space. Solution: slim metal-leg dining chairs for window zone, leather leisure chairs for bar zone, booth seating and stripe accent chairs for lounge zone.

title_zh: 德基广场空中花园户外咖啡厅家具项目
title_en: Deji Plaza Sky Garden Cafe Furniture Project
desc_zh:
德基广场作为南京高端商业地标，本项目位于一期七层空中花园休闲区域，以城市绿洲为核心概念，将餐饮、咖啡、休憩、社交体验融合在同一空间中。

【客户需求】家具必须与空中花园的自然氛围融合；需要具备较强的商业耐用性；造型要有设计感；需要适应咖啡外摆区、吧台高脚椅区、公共休闲区等不同功能区域。

【我们的解决方案】材质以暖木色、咖色、米色为主；产品类型涵盖高脚吧椅、咖啡桌椅、休闲椅、公共长椅及定制化座位组合。

【落地效果】暖木色座椅、简洁的咖啡桌、弧形吧台和高脚椅与周围绿植、灯光、建筑曲线形成了统一的视觉关系，让空间同时具备了翻台效率、停留舒适度和品牌调性。
desc_en: Sky garden outdoor cafe furniture at Deji Plaza, Nanjing. Urban oasis concept. Warm wood, cafe brown and beige tones with high bar stools, cafe tables, lounge chairs and public benches integrated with greenery.

title_zh: 伦敦高端西餐厅连锁门店家具项目
title_en: Premium Western Restaurant Chain Furniture Project – London
desc_zh:
该项目为伦敦某高端西餐厅连锁品牌的多门店家具定制工程。客户对各门店视觉风格的高度统一有严格要求，整体以深胡桃木色、皮革黑与暖铜金属为主色调，营造沉稳而不失精致的现代欧式就餐氛围。

【客户核心需求】各门店家具必须保持品牌一致性；座椅需要兼顾正式感与舒适度；吧台区需要有设计感的高脚椅；面料须通过英国商业耐磨及防火标准。

【我们的解决方案】主厅区域选用高背皮革餐椅，深棕色与黑色交替排列，与木纹桌面和铜色桌脚形成统一调性；卡座组合区以固定木框卡座搭配活动餐椅；吧台区定制高脚椅，座面采用皮革软包，脚踏使用抛光铜管；等候休闲区搭配低矮休闲单椅与边几。

【落地效果】全系列产品采用商用级海绵填充，面料通过耐磨及防火测试，满足英国BS7176商业家具使用标准。多门店落地后视觉风格高度统一，品牌辨识度显著提升。
desc_en: Multi-location custom furniture project for a premium Western restaurant chain in London. Deep walnut, leather black and warm brass metal palette. High-back leather dining chairs, wood-frame booth seating, brass-detail bar stools and lounge seating. All pieces meet UK BS7176 commercial furniture standards.

title_zh: 北京川菜馆家具定制项目
desc_zh:
该项目位于北京市核心商圈的一家川菜主题餐厅，面积约280平方米，定位为正宗川菜体验与商务宴请场所。空间设计以深木色、红色点缀与现代中式元素为主，营造热情、传统而不失现代感的用餐氛围。

【客户核心需求】家具必须符合川菜餐厅的文化调性；座椅需兼顾舒适度与高频翻台效率；包厢区需要私密性强的卡座设计；整体耐用性要经受高人流量考验；材质需防油污易清洁。

【我们的解决方案】主厅区域配置实木框架餐椅，深棕色与红色软包坐垫交替排列，与空间主题呼应；靠墙卡座区采用高背软包卡座，红木色框架搭配深色皮革，围合感强且易清洁；包厢区定制固定卡座与活动餐椅组合，软包面料选用防污耐磨商用级材质；散台区配置可快速翻台的轻便餐椅与圆桌组合。

【落地效果】实木餐椅与川菜文化装饰元素形成统一视觉语言；卡座区的红木色框架与墙面装饰线条相呼应；包厢区软包座椅提升了私密用餐体验；所有座椅通过防污面料处理，大幅降低了日常维护成本；整体家具配置在保持文化氛围的同时，满足了高频商业使用的耐久性要求。
desc_en:
Sichuan restaurant furniture project in Beijing's core business district. 280 sqm space blending traditional Sichuan culture with modern design. Deep wood tones, red accents and contemporary Chinese elements.

Solution: solid wood frame dining chairs with red upholstered cushions for main hall; high-back leather booth seating with rosewood frames for wall zones; custom booth-chair combinations for private rooms with stain-resistant commercial-grade fabric; lightweight chairs with round tables for quick-service zones.

Result: wood chairs echoed Sichuan cultural decor; rosewood booth frames matched wall trim; private room upholstery enhanced dining privacy; stain-resistant fabric significantly reduced maintenance costs while preserving cultural atmosphere and meeting high-frequency durability requirements.

title_zh: 广州CHIO起雾·客厅家具项目
title_en: Guangzhou CHIO Cafe & Lounge Furniture Project
desc_zh:
该项目位于广州某高端商业综合体内的CHIO起雾·客厅复合空间，面积约350平方米，定位为咖啡、轻食、社交、办公多功能融合空间。整体设计以浅木色、米白色与暖灰色为主调，强调自然、放松、高效的现代都市生活方式。

【客户核心需求】家具需适应多场景使用（办公、社交、休闲）；座椅要兼顾长时间停留的舒适度；不同功能区需要不同的家具组合；整体风格需与品牌"起雾"的轻松、模糊边界感契合；产品须符合高端商业空间的品质要求。

【我们的解决方案】吧台区配置高脚椅，浅木色与金属腿结合，简洁轻盈；咖啡散座区选用北欧风餐椅搭配小圆桌，适合快速翻台；沙发休闲区配置深度坐感的布艺沙发与单人休闲椅，米白色与暖灰色交织；办公共享区定制长桌搭配人体工学座椅，满足长时间工作需求；部分区域使用模块化座椅，可根据活动需求灵活组合。

【落地效果】浅木色家具与大面积落地玻璃、自然采光形成通透轻盈的空间感；米白色沙发与暖灰色单椅让休闲区更具层次；办公区人体工学椅显著提升了顾客停留时长；模块化座椅的灵活性让空间承办小型活动时游刃有余；整体家具配置成功诠释了"起雾"品牌模糊工作与休闲边界的理念，深受年轻客群喜爱。
desc_en:
CHIO Cafe & Lounge multi-functional space in a premium Guangzhou commercial complex. 350 sqm space integrating coffee, light meals, socializing and co-working. Light wood, off-white and warm grey palette emphasizing natural, relaxed modern urban lifestyle.

Solution: light wood and metal bar stools for counter zone; Nordic-style dining chairs with small round tables for quick-service cafe zone; deep-cushion fabric sofas and lounge chairs in off-white and warm grey for relaxation zone; long tables with ergonomic chairs for co-working zone; modular seating for flexible event configurations.

Result: light wood furniture paired with floor-to-ceiling glass created airy transparency; off-white sofas and grey lounge chairs added visual depth to relaxation zones; ergonomic office chairs significantly increased dwell time; modular seating flexibility enabled small events; overall furniture successfully embodied the brand's concept of blurring work-leisure boundaries, earning strong appeal among young clientele.

title_zh: 杭州川菜馆家具定制项目
desc_zh:
该项目位于杭州市某商业街区的川菜主题餐厅，面积约180平方米，定位为面向本地食客与游客的正宗川菜体验空间。空间设计以深红色、原木色与金属元素为主，营造热烈、传统且具有现代感的用餐氛围。

【客户核心需求】家具需符合川菜餐厅的文化特色；座椅要舒适且耐用，适应高频翻台；预算控制在合理范围内；材质需防油污、易清洁；整体风格需与杭州本地审美结合。

【我们的解决方案】主厅区域配置实木框架餐椅，深棕色软包坐垫，耐用易清洁；靠窗卡座区采用红色皮革软包搭配木质框架，增加视觉记忆点；散台区选用轻便餐椅，方便快速调整座位布局；所有座椅面料经过防污处理，符合川菜高油餐饮场景需求。

【落地效果】实木餐椅与川菜文化装饰相得益彰；红色卡座成为顾客拍照打卡的热门区域；防污面料显著降低了日常清洁难度；整体家具配置在预算范围内实现了文化表达与商业实用性的平衡。
desc_en:
Sichuan restaurant furniture project in Hangzhou commercial district. 180 sqm space targeting local diners and tourists seeking authentic Sichuan cuisine. Deep red, natural wood and metal elements create warm, traditional yet modern dining atmosphere.

Solution: solid wood frame dining chairs with dark brown upholstered cushions, durable and easy to clean; red leather upholstered booth seating with wood frames at window zone for visual appeal; lightweight chairs for flexible seating arrangements; all fabrics treated with stain-resistant coating for high-oil Sichuan cuisine environment.

Result: wood chairs complemented Sichuan cultural decor; red booths became popular photo spots; stain-resistant fabric significantly eased daily cleaning; overall furniture configuration achieved balance between cultural expression and commercial practicality within budget.

title_zh: 陕西汉中市火锅店家具项目
title_en: Hanzhong Shaanxi Hot Pot Restaurant Furniture Project
desc_zh:
该项目位于陕西省汉中市某商业综合体内的火锅主题餐厅，面积约220平方米，定位为面向家庭聚餐与朋友聚会的大众火锅消费场所。空间设计以暖木色、橙红色与工业感元素为主，营造热闹、亲民、舒适的用餐氛围。

【客户核心需求】家具需适应火锅餐饮的高温高湿环境；座椅要防水防污，易于清洁维护；卡座区需满足4-6人家庭聚餐需求；整体造价需控制在连锁火锅店预算范围内；耐用性要经受每日高频使用考验。

【我们的解决方案】主厅散台区配置仿木纹防火板餐桌搭配仿皮餐椅，防水易擦；卡座区采用皮革软包长椅搭配固定桌面，围合感强且便于清洁；所有座椅使用商用级防污皮革，耐高温、防油污；桌面选用耐高温台面材质，抗烫伤、易清洁；椅脚采用加固金属框架，增强承重与稳定性。

【落地效果】仿皮座椅与火锅场景完美适配，油污水渍一擦即净；卡座区成为家庭聚餐的首选区域；耐高温桌面经受住了每日火锅使用的考验；金属框架椅腿显著提升了产品使用寿命；整体家具配置在控制成本的同时，满足了火锅餐饮的特殊使用需求，获得业主持续复购。
desc_en:
Hot pot restaurant furniture project in a Hanzhong, Shaanxi commercial complex. 220 sqm space targeting family dining and social gatherings. Warm wood tones, orange-red accents and industrial elements create lively, approachable and comfortable dining atmosphere.

Solution: wood-effect laminate tables with faux-leather chairs for open seating, waterproof and easy to wipe; leather upholstered booth benches with fixed tabletops for strong enclosure and easy cleaning; all seating uses commercial-grade stain-resistant leather, heat-resistant and oil-proof; tabletops in heat-resistant material, scald-proof and easy to clean; reinforced metal chair frames for enhanced load-bearing and stability.

Result: faux-leather chairs perfectly suited hot pot environment, oil and water stains wiped clean instantly; booth zones became preferred choice for family dining; heat-resistant tabletops withstood daily hot pot use; metal chair frames significantly extended product lifespan; overall furniture configuration met specialized hot pot dining requirements while controlling costs, earning repeat orders from the owner.

title_zh: 东京轻食咖啡厅家具项目
title_en: Tokyo Light Meal Cafe Furniture Project
desc_zh:
该项目位于东京涩谷区某商业街区的轻食咖啡厅，面积约120平方米，定位为面向上班族与年轻消费者的快捷轻食空间。空间设计以原木色、白色与浅绿色为主调，强调自然、清爽、高效的用餐体验。

【客户核心需求】家具需适应快速翻台的运营需求；座椅要轻便易移动，便于清洁；整体风格需符合日式简约美学；产品须通过日本商业家具耐用性测试；预算控制在合理范围内。

【我们的解决方案】临窗吧台区配置原木色高脚椅，座面采用曲木工艺，轻便耐用；散座区选用北欧风餐椅，白色金属腿搭配原木坐面；卡座区使用浅绿色布艺软包搭配原木框架，增加舒适度；所有餐桌采用防水耐磨桌面，易于清洁。

【落地效果】原木色与白色的搭配让空间更加明亮通透；浅绿色卡座成为顾客拍照打卡的热门区域；家具的轻便性大幅提升了运营效率，业主对翻台率提升表示满意。
desc_en:
Light meal cafe furniture project in Tokyo Shibuya district. 120 sqm space targeting office workers and young consumers. Natural wood, white and light green palette emphasizing fresh, efficient dining.

Solution: bentwood high stools in natural oak for window bar zone; Nordic-style dining chairs with white metal legs and wood seats for open seating; light green fabric upholstered booth seating with wood frames; all tabletops waterproof and wear-resistant.

Result: natural wood and white tones brightened the space; light green booths became a popular photo spot; lightweight furniture significantly improved operational efficiency and table turnover.

title_zh: 温哥华海鲜餐厅家具项目
desc_zh:
该项目位于加拿大温哥华滨水区的一家海鲜主题餐厅，面积约280平方米，定位为面向家庭聚餐与朋友聚会的中高端休闲餐厅。空间设计以蓝白色调为主，融入海洋元素与自然木纹，营造轻松愉悦的用餐氛围。

【客户核心需求】家具需呼应海洋主题；座椅要舒适，适合家庭长时间用餐；不同区域需要不同的座位组合；材质须防水防潮，适应滨水环境；产品须通过加拿大商业家具标准。

【我们的解决方案】主厅区域配置蓝白条纹布艺餐椅，搭配原木色餐桌；靠窗卡座区使用深蓝色皮革软包，防水易清洁；儿童友好区配置圆角设计的矮桌椅组合；户外露台区选用防腐木框架搭配防水布艺坐垫的休闲椅。

【落地效果】蓝白条纹餐椅与墙面海洋壁画、吊灯形成统一的主题氛围；卡座区的深蓝色软包与窗外海景相呼应；儿童友好区的圆角设计获得家庭顾客的好评；户外露台家具经受住了温哥华多雨气候的考验。
desc_en:
Seafood restaurant furniture project in Vancouver waterfront area. 280 sqm space targeting family dining and social gatherings. Blue and white palette with ocean elements and natural wood grain.

Solution: blue-and-white striped fabric dining chairs with natural wood tables for main hall; deep blue leather upholstered booth seating for window zone, waterproof and easy to clean; rounded-corner low table-chair sets for family-friendly zone; outdoor patio chairs with rot-resistant wood frames and waterproof fabric cushions.

Result: striped chairs paired with ocean murals and pendant lights created a unified theme; deep blue booth upholstery echoed the waterfront view outside; rounded-corner furniture in the kids zone earned positive family feedback; outdoor furniture withstood Vancouver's rainy climate.

title_zh: 迪拜五星级酒店行政酒廊家具项目
title_en: Dubai Five-Star Hotel Executive Lounge Furniture Project
desc_zh:
该项目位于阿联酋迪拜某五星级商务酒店的行政酒廊，面积约400平方米，定位为面向高端商务客群的私密社交与办公空间。空间设计以金色、深棕色与乳白色为主调，融合现代奢华与阿拉伯传统元素，营造尊贵、舒适、高效的商务体验。

【客户核心需求】家具必须符合五星级酒店的品质标准；座椅要兼顾长时间停留的舒适度与正式感；不同功能区需要不同的家具配置（会客、办公、休闲、餐饮）；材质需耐用且易于维护；整体风格需与酒店品牌形象统一；产品须通过阿联酋商业家具防火标准。

【我们的解决方案】会客区配置深棕色真皮沙发与单人休闲椅，金属装饰线条呼应奢华定位；办公区定制长桌搭配人体工学座椅，深木纹与金属腿结合；餐饮区选用高背软包餐椅，乳白色与金色点缀；休闲阅读区配置天鹅绒布艺单椅与边几，深蓝色与金色搭配；所有座椅填充采用高密度海绵，皮革与布艺均通过防火测试；桌面使用大理石纹理面板，耐磨易清洁。

【落地效果】深棕色真皮沙发与金色装饰线条、水晶吊灯形成统一的奢华氛围；人体工学办公椅显著提升了商务客人的工作体验；高背餐椅的正式感与私密性获得客人高度评价；天鹅绒单椅成为酒廊的视觉亮点，深受Instagram打卡者喜爱；所有家具通过严格的防火测试，满足迪拜消防安全要求；整体家具配置成功打造了兼具商务效率与奢华体验的行政酒廊空间，酒店客户满意度评分显著提升。
desc_en:
Five-star hotel executive lounge furniture project in Dubai, UAE. 400 sqm space targeting premium business clientele for private socializing and working. Gold, deep brown and off-white palette blending modern luxury with Arabian traditional elements.

Client needs: furniture must meet five-star hotel quality standards; seating must balance long-stay comfort with formal appearance; different functional zones require distinct furniture (meeting, working, leisure, dining); materials must be durable and easy to maintain; overall style must align with hotel brand image; products must pass UAE commercial furniture fire safety standards.

Solution: deep brown genuine leather sofas and lounge chairs with metallic trim for meeting zone; custom long tables with ergonomic chairs in dark wood grain and metal legs for working zone; high-back upholstered dining chairs in off-white with gold accents for dining zone; velvet fabric lounge chairs with side tables in deep blue and gold for reading zone; all seating filled with high-density foam, leather and fabric passed fire tests; marble-texture tabletops for durability and easy cleaning.

Result: deep brown leather sofas paired with gold trim and crystal chandeliers created unified luxurious atmosphere; ergonomic office chairs significantly enhanced business guests working experience; formal appearance and privacy of high-back dining chairs earned high praise; velvet lounge chairs became visual highlight and Instagram favorite; all furniture passed strict fire safety tests meeting Dubai fire code; overall furniture configuration successfully created an executive lounge balancing business efficiency with luxury experience, significantly boosting hotel guest satisfaction scores.

title_zh: 悉尼联合办公空间家具项目
desc_zh:
该项目位于澳大利亚悉尼CBD核心区域的一处联合办公空间，面积约600平方米，定位为面向初创企业、自由职业者与远程办公者的灵活办公社区。空间设计以浅木色、白色与活力橙为主调，强调开放、协作、创新的工作氛围。

【客户核心需求】家具需适应多场景使用（专注办公、团队协作、休闲交流、会议路演）；座椅要符合人体工学，支持长时间工作；不同区域需要灵活可变的家具组合；材质需环保且耐用；整体风格需吸引年轻创业者；产品须通过澳大利亚AFRDI商业家具标准。

【我们的解决方案】开放工位区配置网背人体工学办公椅，浅灰色网布透气舒适，搭配升降式工作台；团队协作区使用模块化会议桌搭配带轮座椅，可快速重组空间布局；电话亭区定制隔音单人工作舱，配备符合人体工学的座椅与折叠桌板；休闲交流区配置橙色布艺沙发与高脚吧椅，营造轻松氛围；路演会议区选用可堆叠折叠椅，便于活动时灵活安排座位；所有办公椅通过AFRDI Level 6认证，确保8小时以上使用舒适度；桌面选用环保E1级板材，符合澳洲环保标准。

【落地效果】网背人体工学椅显著降低了会员的腰背疲劳感，获得大量好评；模块化会议桌的灵活性让空间承办各类活动游刃有余；隔音工作舱成为需要专注工作或电话会议者的首选；橙色沙发与白色墙面、浅木地板形成明快的视觉对比，增强了空间活力；可堆叠椅的便利性让大型活动筹备时间缩短50%；所有家具通过AFRDI认证，满足保险与安全要求；整体家具配置成功打造了灵活、健康、富有活力的联合办公空间，会员续约率达到85%以上。
desc_en:
Co-working space furniture project in Sydney CBD core area, Australia. 600 sqm space targeting startups, freelancers and remote workers. Light wood, white and vibrant orange palette emphasizing open, collaborative and innovative work atmosphere.

Client needs: furniture must adapt to multi-scenario use (focused work, team collaboration, casual communication, presentation meetings); seating must be ergonomic for long working hours; different zones need flexible reconfigurable furniture; materials must be eco-friendly and durable; overall style must appeal to young entrepreneurs; products must pass Australian AFRDI commercial furniture standards.

Solution: mesh-back ergonomic office chairs in light grey breathable mesh with height-adjustable desks for open workstation zone; modular meeting tables with wheeled chairs for quick space reconfiguration in team collaboration zone; soundproof single-person work pods with ergonomic chairs and fold-down tables for phone booth zone; orange fabric sofas and high bar stools for casual lounge zone; stackable folding chairs for presentation meeting zone; all office chairs AFRDI Level 6 certified for 8+ hour comfort; tabletops in eco-friendly E1-grade board meeting Australian environmental standards.

Result: mesh-back ergonomic chairs significantly reduced members back fatigue, earning widespread praise; modular meeting tables flexibility enabled hosting various events with ease; soundproof pods became first choice for focused work or phone calls; orange sofas contrasted with white walls and light wood floors, enhancing space vitality; stackable chairs convenience reduced large event setup time by 50%; all furniture AFRDI certified, meeting insurance and safety requirements; overall furniture configuration successfully created a flexible, healthy and energetic co-working space with member renewal rate exceeding 85%.

title_zh: 巴塞罗那海滨露台餐厅家具项目
title_en: Barcelona Seaside Terrace Restaurant Furniture Project
desc_zh:
该项目位于西班牙巴塞罗那地中海海滨的一家露台餐厅，面积约320平方米（含室内与露台），定位为面向游客与本地食客的地中海风情餐饮空间。空间设计以蓝白色调为主，融入航海元素与自然藤编，营造轻松、浪漫、度假感的用餐氛围。

【客户核心需求】家具需适应地中海气候（强日晒、海风、偶尔降雨）；户外座椅必须防水防晒抗腐蚀；座椅要轻便，便于根据客流调整布局；整体风格需呼应地中海主题；材质需环保且耐用；产品须通过欧盟户外家具标准；预算需控制在中高端餐厅范围内。

【我们的解决方案】露台区配置铝合金框架搭配PE藤编的餐椅，蓝白条纹防水坐垫，轻便防腐；临海栏杆区使用高脚吧椅，白色粉末涂层铝材搭配柚木扶手，防锈耐晒；室内过渡区选用藤编餐椅搭配实木餐桌，保持风格统一；遮阳棚下的休闲区配置藤编沙发与茶几，米白色防水坐垫；所有户外家具使用UV防护处理，抗紫外线褪色；坐垫采用快干透气面料，防霉防潮；铝合金框架经过海洋级防腐处理，抗盐雾腐蚀。

【落地效果】蓝白条纹坐垫与地中海蓝色海景、白色建筑形成经典的希腊风情；PE藤编餐椅经受住了巴塞罗那夏季强烈日晒的考验，色泽保持良好；轻便的铝合金框架让服务员可以快速调整座位布局应对客流变化；高脚吧椅成为顾客观赏日落的最佳座位，预订率极高；快干坐垫在偶尔降雨后迅速恢复使用，减少运营中断；海洋级防腐处理确保家具在海风环境下使用寿命达5年以上；整体家具配置成功打造了充满地中海风情的露台餐厅，成为巴塞罗那网红打卡地，旺季需提前预订。
desc_en:
Seaside terrace restaurant furniture project in Barcelona, Spain. 320 sqm space (indoor and terrace) targeting tourists and local diners with Mediterranean ambiance. Blue and white palette with nautical elements and natural rattan weave.

Client needs: furniture must withstand Mediterranean climate (strong sun, sea breeze, occasional rain); outdoor seating must be waterproof, UV-resistant and corrosion-proof; chairs must be lightweight for flexible layout adjustment; overall style must echo Mediterranean theme; materials must be eco-friendly and durable; products must pass EU outdoor furniture standards; budget must stay within mid-to-high-end restaurant range.

Solution: aluminum frame dining chairs with PE rattan weave and blue-white striped waterproof cushions for terrace zone, lightweight and rust-proof; white powder-coated aluminum bar stools with teak armrests for seaside railing zone, rust-resistant and sun-proof; rattan dining chairs with solid wood tables for indoor transition zone, maintaining style unity; rattan sofas with coffee tables and off-white waterproof cushions for shaded lounge zone; all outdoor furniture treated with UV protection against fading; cushions in quick-dry breathable fabric, mold and moisture resistant; aluminum frames with marine-grade anti-corrosion treatment against salt spray.

Result: blue-white striped cushions paired with Mediterranean blue sea and white architecture created classic Greek-style ambiance; PE rattan chairs withstood Barcelona intense summer sun with excellent color retention; lightweight aluminum frames enabled staff to quickly adjust seating layout for varying crowds; bar stools became premium sunset-viewing seats with high reservation rate; quick-dry cushions resumed use rapidly after occasional rain, minimizing operational disruption; marine-grade anti-corrosion treatment ensured furniture lifespan exceeds 5 years in sea breeze environment; overall furniture configuration successfully created a Mediterranean-style terrace restaurant that became a Barcelona Instagram hotspot requiring advance booking during peak season.

title_zh: 东京银座精品咖啡馆家具项目
title_en: Tokyo Ginza Specialty Coffee Shop Furniture Project
desc_zh:
本项目位于日本东京银座商业核心区的一家精品咖啡馆，空间约180平方米，定位为主打单品手冲与烘焙甜点的“第三空间”咖啡馆。空间以原木色、米白色与黑色金属为主色调，融入日式侘寂美学与现代极简风格，营造安静、温润、专注的咖啡体验。

【客户核心需求】家具必须契合精品咖啡馆的高品质调性；座椅需兼顾短时外带等候与长时停留办公两种使用场景；吧台区需要营造观看手冲制作过程的互动感；不同区域（吧台体验区、双人卡座区、靠窗独坐区、小组洽谈区）需要差异化家具方案；材料须环保耐用、易于清洁；整体风格要符合东京年轻白领与咖啡爱好者的审美。

【我们的解决方案】吧台体验区采用高脚实木吧椅搭配黑色金属脚架，让顾客近距离观看手冲冲煮全过程；双人卡座区使用浅木色方桌配软包单椅，坐垫填充高密度海绵，兼顾舒适与耐用；靠窗独坐区设置一排细长实木吧台与高脚凳，满足单人办公与独处需求；小组洽谈区采用可拼接圆桌与轻量座椅，灵活适应人数变化；所有木质家具选用FSC认证原木并做食品级环保涂装；桌面经过防水耐磨处理，方便日常清洁维护。

【落地效果】高脚吧椅让吧台体验区成为咖啡馆人气最高的座位，顾客可全程观赏手冲过程，互动感显著增强；浅木色卡座与米白软装相互搭配，营造出温润安静的日式侘寂氛围；靠窗独坐吧台成为单人办公与阅读的首选位置；可拼接圆桌灵活满足了小组聚会与商务洽谈需求；FSC认证原木与食品级涂装契合品牌的可持续理念；整体家具配置成功打造出一个安静、精致、富有日式美学的第三空间，开业三个月即成为银座区域的口碑咖啡馆，工作日上座率稳定保持在80%以上。
desc_en:
Specialty coffee shop furniture project in the core commercial area of Ginza, Tokyo, Japan. 180 sqm space positioned as a "third place" coffee shop focused on single-origin pour-over and artisan pastries. Natural wood, off-white and black metal palette blending Japanese wabi-sabi aesthetics with modern minimalism for a quiet, warm and focused coffee experience.

Client needs: furniture must match the high quality tone of a specialty coffee shop; seating must serve both short takeaway waiting and long-stay working scenarios; the bar area must create interactive engagement with the pour-over brewing process; different zones (bar experience, two-seat booth, window solo, small-group meeting) require distinct furniture solutions; materials must be eco-friendly, durable and easy to clean; overall style must appeal to Tokyo's young professionals and coffee enthusiasts.

Solution: solid wood bar stools with black metal legs for the bar experience zone, allowing guests to watch the entire pour-over process up close; light wood square tables with upholstered chairs filled with high-density foam for the two-seat booth zone, balancing comfort and durability; a row of slim solid wood counters with high stools for the window solo zone, serving single-person work and solitude; reconfigurable round tables with lightweight chairs for the small-group meeting zone, flexibly adapting to group size; all wood furniture made from FSC-certified timber with food-grade eco-friendly finishes; tabletops treated for water and abrasion resistance for easy daily cleaning.

Result: bar stools made the bar experience zone the most popular seating in the shop, with guests watching the full pour-over process and enjoying enhanced engagement; light wood booths paired with off-white soft furnishings created a warm and quiet Japanese wabi-sabi atmosphere; the window solo counter became the first choice for individual work and reading; reconfigurable round tables flexibly met small gatherings and business meeting needs; FSC-certified timber and food-grade finishes aligned with the brand's sustainability values; the overall furniture configuration successfully created a quiet, refined third place rich in Japanese aesthetics, becoming a word-of-mouth coffee shop in the Ginza area within three months of opening, with weekday occupancy steadily holding above 80%.

title_zh: 曼谷高空景观餐厅家具项目
title_en: Bangkok Rooftop Skyline Restaurant Furniture Project
desc_zh:
本项目位于泰国曼谷素坤逸商圈一栋高层建筑顶层的高空景观餐厅，空间约520平方米，含室内用餐区与露天观景平台，定位为面向商务宴请与高端游客的天际线景观餐厅。空间以深色金属、藤编、热带绿植与暖色灯光为主要设计语言，融合东南亚热带风情与现代轻奢格调，营造浪漫、惬意、有仪式感的高空用餐体验。

【客户核心需求】露天平台家具须能抵御曼谷高温、强紫外线与雨季潮湿；座椅需兼顾舒适度与高空风环境下的稳定性；室内与露天区域风格需统一过渡；不同区域（室内宴请区、露天卡座区、吧台观景区、半开放包厢区）需要差异化方案；材料须防水防晒防霉、耐腐蚀；整体定位须符合高端商务与轻奢调性。

【我们的解决方案】室内宴请区采用深色实木餐桌搭配高背软包餐椅，坐感舒适且仪式感强；露天卡座区使用铝合金框架配PE藤编座椅与防水坐垫，轻便防锈且抗紫外线；吧台观景区设置高脚吧椅搭配防腐木吧台，方便游客凭栏观赏天际线；半开放包厢区通过藤编隔断、固定卡座与暖色壁灯形成独立用餐单元；所有露天家具做UV防晒与防霉处理，坐垫采用速干透气面料；金属框架做户外防腐涂层，抵御雨季潮湿与酸雨侵蚀。

【落地效果】室内深木餐桌与高背软包椅营造出稳重正式的宴请氛围，获得商务客户好评；露天PE藤编卡座经受住曼谷高温与强紫外线考验，色泽保持良好；吧台高脚椅成为顾客观赏曼谷天际线日落的热门座位，黄金时段需提前预订；速干坐垫在雨季短时降雨后可迅速恢复使用，降低运营中断；金属框架防腐涂层确保家具在高空潮湿环境下使用寿命超过5年；整体家具配置成功打造出一家兼具热带风情与现代轻奢的高空景观餐厅，开业后迅速成为曼谷社交媒体打卡热点，节假日一座难求。
desc_en:
Rooftop skyline restaurant furniture project on the top floor of a high-rise in the Sukhumvit district of Bangkok, Thailand. 520 sqm space (indoor dining and open-air viewing terrace) targeting business banquets and premium tourists. Dark metal, rattan weave, tropical greenery and warm lighting blend Southeast Asian tropical character with modern light-luxury for a romantic, relaxed and ceremonial high-altitude dining experience.

Client needs: terrace furniture must withstand Bangkok's high heat, strong UV and rainy-season humidity; seating must balance comfort with stability in high-altitude wind; indoor and outdoor zones must transition in a unified style; different zones (indoor banquet, terrace booth, bar viewing, semi-private room) require distinct solutions; materials must be waterproof, UV-resistant, mold-proof and corrosion-resistant; overall positioning must match high-end business and light-luxury tone.

Solution: dark solid wood dining tables with high-back upholstered dining chairs for the indoor banquet zone, comfortable and ceremonial; aluminum frames with PE rattan seats and waterproof cushions for the terrace booth zone, lightweight, rust-proof and UV-resistant; high bar stools with anti-corrosion wood counters for the bar viewing zone, letting guests admire the skyline over the railing; rattan partitions, fixed booths and warm wall lamps form independent dining units in the semi-private room zone; all outdoor furniture treated for UV protection and mold resistance, cushions in quick-dry breathable fabric; metal frames coated with outdoor anti-corrosion finish against rainy-season humidity and acid rain.

Result: indoor dark wood tables and high-back upholstered chairs created a solid, formal banquet atmosphere praised by business clients; terrace PE rattan booths withstood Bangkok's heat and intense UV with excellent color retention; bar stools became the popular seats for watching Bangkok's skyline sunset, requiring advance booking at prime time; quick-dry cushions resumed use rapidly after brief rainy-season showers, minimizing operational disruption; metal frame anti-corrosion coating ensured furniture lifespan over 5 years in the humid high-altitude environment; the overall furniture configuration successfully created a rooftop skyline restaurant combining tropical character with modern light-luxury, quickly becoming a Bangkok social-media hotspot fully booked on holidays.

title_zh: 巴黎左岸精品酒店大堂家具项目
title_en: Paris Left Bank Boutique Hotel Lobby Furniture Project
desc_zh:
本项目位于法国巴黎左岸（拉丁区）的一家精品设计酒店大堂与休息廊，空间约450平方米，定位为面向文化艺术客群与高端商旅人士的精品酒店公共空间。空间以胡桃木、丝绒软包、黄铜金属与莫兰迪色系为主要设计语言，融合法式优雅与Art Deco装饰艺术风格，营造典雅、温暖、富有人文气息的迎宾氛围。

【客户核心需求】家具须符合精品设计酒店的高端品味与艺术调性；座椅需兼顾迎宾等候的舒适度与长时停留的耐用性；不同区域（前台迎宾区、大堂吧休息区、阅读洽谈区、午后茶歇区）需要差异化家具方案；材料须耐用、易维护，符合欧盟酒店家具阻燃标准；整体须延续品牌的法式优雅与艺术格调。

【我们的解决方案】前台迎宾区采用胡桃木前台搭配黄铜饰条与丝绒坐凳，提升迎宾仪式感；大堂吧休息区使用丝绒软包沙发与单人扶手椅，坐垫填充高密度海绵，兼顾舒适与挺括；阅读洽谈区配置小型圆桌与软包单椅，营造私密安静的洽谈氛围；午后茶歇区设置低矮茶几与休闲扶手椅，方便享用下午茶；所有软包家具的填充物与面料均通过欧盟阻燃测试；金属部件做黄铜电镀处理，木作选用胡桃木实木贴面，兼顾质感与耐用。

【落地效果】胡桃木前台与黄铜饰条营造出典雅的法式迎宾仪式感；丝绒软包沙发与莫兰迪色软装搭配水晶吊灯，形成温暖优雅的大堂吧氛围；阅读洽谈区的私密布局获得商旅客人好评；午后茶歇区成为住客享用下午茶与社交的热门空间；所有家具通过欧盟阻燃测试，满足巴黎酒店消防安全要求；胡桃木与丝绒的材质搭配延续了品牌的Art Deco艺术格调；整体家具配置成功打造出一个典雅、温暖、富有人文气息的精品酒店公共空间，显著提升了住客的入住体验与品牌好感度。
desc_en:
Boutique design hotel lobby and lounge furniture project on the Left Bank (Latin Quarter) of Paris, France. 450 sqm public space targeting cultural and artistic clientele and high-end business travelers. Walnut wood, velvet upholstery, brass metal and a Morandi color palette blend French elegance with Art Deco style for an elegant, warm and culturally rich welcoming atmosphere.

Client needs: furniture must match the high-end taste and artistic tone of a boutique design hotel; seating must balance welcoming-area comfort with long-stay durability; different zones (reception welcome, lobby bar lounge, reading and meeting, afternoon tea) require distinct furniture solutions; materials must be durable, easy to maintain and meet EU hotel furniture flame-retardant standards; the overall look must continue the brand's French elegance and artistic style.

Solution: a walnut reception desk with brass trim and velvet stools for the reception welcome zone, enhancing the welcoming ceremony; velvet upholstered sofas and single armchairs filled with high-density foam for the lobby bar lounge zone, balancing comfort and firmness; small round tables with upholstered chairs for the reading and meeting zone, creating a private and quiet conversation atmosphere; low coffee tables with leisure armchairs for the afternoon tea zone; all upholstered furniture fillings and fabrics passed EU flame-retardant tests; metal parts finished in brass plating and woodwork in walnut solid-wood veneer, balancing texture and durability.

Result: the walnut reception desk and brass trim created an elegant French welcoming ceremony; velvet sofas paired with Morandi-toned soft furnishings and crystal chandeliers formed a warm and elegant lobby bar atmosphere; the private layout of the reading and meeting zone earned praise from business travelers; the afternoon tea zone became a popular space for guests to enjoy tea and socialize; all furniture passed EU flame-retardant tests, meeting Paris hotel fire safety requirements; the pairing of walnut and velvet continued the brand's Art Deco style; the overall furniture configuration successfully created an elegant, warm and culturally rich boutique hotel public space, significantly enhancing guest experience and brand affinity.
